name: off_the_record
description: Off the Record (q.side_offrec, Sango): Lucian's three quiet errands played end-to-end — ledger satchel to Oma, bread basket to Fara, get logged by an auditor (Bomani) on purpose, then back to Lucian for the quiet pay. Assumes the player has fewer than 3 badges and fakes docs_filed (Personnel File stage 1 turn-in) in the preamble so Lucian's off_record_prompt entry surfaces. Auditor sightings mid-carry are fail-soft (they only halve the errand pay and latch off_record_blown), so the run asserts tags, not the pay-variant actionbars.

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag the chain sets, observation scores, granted items --
-- defensive: an aborted courier run leaves carrying_dead_letter, whose priority delivery entry shadows every Lucian dialog (verified live, twice) --
load is idempotent (objectives add no-ops when present) — guarantees obs_count/obs_cd exist before the sets
-- prerequisite (assumed-faked): docs_filed = Personnel File stage 1 filed; with badges<3 that surfaces off_record_prompt (prio 51) over open_file (42) --
-- beat 1: Lucian Scrollkeeper at her archive desk — take the ledger satchel --
fresh-world guard: Lucian's approach_once (open_file) may auto-open on the very first ever visit; screen.close is a no-op otherwise

expect_screen_text: Lower your voice. The two grey coats in the square are on an observation sweep, and everything they see goes on a file that outlives the seer. Some of what this town does should stay off that file. Nothing illegal. Just neighborly, and quiet.

Carry my ledger satchel to Oma at her fence, and do it without a clipboard ever landing its eyes on you. If one does, it is not the end - it is only a line item, and line items can be redacted. But try for clean. Clean is a kind of freedom around here.

steps.comment: -- beat 2: errand 1 — the satchel to Oma at her fence (long leg south; sightings en route only cost pay) --

expect_screen_text: Lucians satchel. And no grey coat on your heel - or if there was, you lost it, which is the same thing to me. Set it here. The less that leaves this fence in writing, the better we all sleep.
One more, while you still have the quiet in you. Run this bread basket to Fara by the noticeboard, same rules. Eyes off you the whole way.

steps.click: Hand over the satchel, take the basket

steps.wait_chat: Carry the bread basket to Fara

steps.comment: -- beat 3: errand 2 — the basket to Fara by the market exchange --

expect_screen_text: Bread from Oma, and you came the long quiet way around the square - I watched you do it. Set it down. Whatever this is really about, I did not see a thing, which is my favourite thing to see.

You are one errand short of whatever Lucian is paying. The last one is backwards: go let the auditors get a good long look at you, reading the poster like the dullest resident alive. Sell them ordinary.

steps.comment: -- beat 4: errand 3 (the inversion) — walk up to auditor Bomani and be logged ON PURPOSE --

-- CONTENT FINDING: Bomani (auditor_a, ambient_guard_patrol) drifts far off his post — no leash (found >48b away live; players may not find the sight cone either). Recall him for the test; recipe needs a Home leash (TODO). --

the counted button is gated on seen_by_auditor, kept per-tick by sidequest/off_record/tick from the auditor's can_see_player — give the PASSIVE sight a moment to latch, then prove it before opening the dialog

steps.comment_: re-find right before walking: Bomani strolls; a stale snapshot stalled this walk at 17.7b (verified live)
the sweep's sight trigger re-opens a follow-up dialog right after the close action - force-close instead of waiting for no-screen (verified live)

steps.comment: -- beat 5: back to Lucian — the debrief and the quiet pay (300 CD; heal_ball only on a never-seen run, so not asserted) --
-- WALKER LIMIT: same archive-stair pinch as no_such_recipient (2628,117,2768). tp the last ~10b to Lucian's desk level. --

expect_screen_text: All three, and the desk in the square is folding its legs. You carried what needed carrying and stood still when standing still was the whole trick. There is a page in my ledger for exactly this kind of work, and unlike theirs, mine forgets on purpose.
Here is what the archive owes you. Spend it on something that does not leave a receipt.
